name: @march/ios
description: March iOS app - Native mobile companion for March productivity platform

scripts.build: xcodebuild -project March.xcodeproj -scheme March -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 15 Pro' build
scripts.test: xcodebuild -project March.xcodeproj -scheme March -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 15 Pro' test

author: March Team
